sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66973" key="metasfairismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετασφαιρισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n66973.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">movement of a ball</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:32:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.32.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
